sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n79003" key="parauxe/nios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παραυχέν-ιος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">η</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n79003.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hanging from the neck</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">φαρέτρη</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">APl.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.253</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
